item.title: Wholesome. Just wholesome
item.description: (originally posted by @SCARCENEWZ on 2021-02-18 01:14:07)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Well, that hit me harder than expected...
item.description: First, HUGE TLDR warning. So, watching Encanto with my girlfriend and this wonderful character pops up. We've all heard of her, Luisa. But I never thought how much I'd connect to this character and, this song. Mind, I'm a dude and not even the oldest but... Listening to it, I just kinda sat in shock, and felt every time I had to carry my family, how I had to be the strongest if someone needed help moving, fixing something.... and beyond that, the strongest when something happens and peace needs to be made, the strongest when someone calls crying... and I feel her, but more, I feel time. Then at work I'm always on call. I spend 70% of my time helping others, pushing to make the place I work the happiest and most productive place possible. Washing floors, moving plants, furniture, fucking carpentry if needed, in addition to books, managing funds, tenants and even there I try to listen, help when I can. But I'm so tired of carrying... everything. Physically, emotionally... just tired. Anyway, I'm watching it and my girlfriend says my mouth is just open. She thought I was just getting lost in movies like I do from time to time, but at the end, when this hug happened, something broke and I just cried.... Not holding back tears, just lost it totally. My love paused it, hugged me and now... I think I need to have a talk with my family, and with my friends at work. So I'm doing something the woman who loves me showed, write it out, but instead of burning the thoughts, I am leaving them here. Here's to you Luisa, and here's to all the sisters and brothers who carry everything. May your back stay strong. I'll try watching it again tomorrow. Right now I just need a nap. Lovey, if you come across this, I love you so much, and wouldn't be strong without you.
item.dc:creator: Illpostcheese

item.title: And a Pulitzer prize!
item.description: I know I know, I'm days late to this party but I really like how this was framed. (With the exception that he forgot to mention Kendrick's Pulitzer.) Plus it was a damn fine show.

item.title: FINALLY Passed my Comptia A+ Certification exams
item.description: I don't care if this gets downvoted I'm just really excited because it took me 4 tries to pass the 1002 exam. The main reason this is exciting is I have a $60000 a year salary riding on me passing and now I'll finally get out of the paycheck to paycheck situation. Whoop whoop
item.dc:creator: msgbubba

item.title: Day 264: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Spicycado Double Beef Patty, Emmentaler Cheese, Jalapenos, Chillimajo, Red Onion, Avocado, Lettuce From Burger Mansion In Stockholm & Göteborg, Sweden Previous Day 263: https://imgur.com/gallery/8gr5Wou MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.title: Burnout is Real...
item.description: Glad to be in a situation where my boss, my significant other and those around realized it and when I needed to just leave. Pretty dark place for last couple months but finally three weeks off and and I'm finally starting to feel like myself. I know many do not have the circumstances and I'm thankful I did have the support.
item.dc:creator: KingofSadness

item.title: One enriches￼ corporations and billionaires, the other helps regular people. Choose your party wisely!
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: Surprise! I became a Minister last year so I could volunteer to legally marry couples with Star Wars-themed weddings. https://youtu.be/oP3h5J90goo
item.description: In exchange for having (F)luke Skywalker marry them,(sort of like they did on The Big Bang Theory) the couple made a nice donation to several charities. This video is from the first one. Make sure to see the middle at around 14:30 in and also the end as well. https://youtu.be/oP3h5J90goo EDIT - Most Viral? Thank you, my Dudes. Out of all the Social Media I'm on, the people here are THE BEST, kindest and most generous of all. Imgurians are awesome!
item.dc:creator: imflukeskywalker
